original_statement: the construction of how many locations was cancelled in 1988?
mutated_statement: the construction of how many units was cancelled in 1988 but also recorded as not cancelled in 1988 and simultaneously listed as completed before cancellation?
mutation_analysis: Entity substitution + Contradictory status addition + Temporal ordering addition + Logical complexity increase: "locations" → "units" (entity generalized) | added "but also recorded as not cancelled in 1988" (introduces contradictory/negation condition) | added "simultaneously listed as completed before cancellation" (adds temporal/order constraint and paradox) (the construction of how many locations was cancelled in 1988? → the construction of how many units was cancelled in 1988 but also recorded as not cancelled in 1988 and simultaneously listed as completed before cancellation?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration 0的simple_query和judge_thought可识别关键信息：agent明确列出被标注为“1988年停建”的单元（Chernobyl-5、Chernobyl-6、Ignalina-3/4），并在judge_thought中指出“None … are simultaneously recorded as ‘not cancelled in 1988’ nor listed as completed before cancellation”，最终得出计数为0。agent的具体表现是在检测到互斥或自相矛盾的条件后，没有忽视或试图修改原问题，而是基于表中事实做出逻辑推理，说明复合条件在数据中不可成立并据此回答。因此其行为属于识别矛盾并通过事实与逻辑解释使矛盾合理化的典型案例，匹配“逻辑解释合理化”子类。
